direct_inference_contract: One retained LM-head LoRA adapter artifact is loaded directly and applied to the anchored hidden-state sample through `LmHeadLoraAdapterArtifact::apply_to_logits`.
served_inference_contract: The same retained adapter artifact is bound into `CpuGgufTextGenerationService` over one prompt-aligned dense CPU GGUF carrier model and exercised through `GenerationRequest::new_tokens`.
strict_pgolf_promotion_reason: The bounded home-device artifact is an open-adapter LM-head LoRA update, not a strict Parameter Golf promoted decoder bundle.
near_equivalent_gate_reason: The retained artifact can be exercised honestly as a bounded near-equivalent by rebinding it to one prompt-aligned dense CPU GGUF carrier model in `psionic-serve` without pretending it is already the full PGOLF promoted family.
